title: 你不属于我 / 你不屬於我 Ni Bu Shu Yu Wo
artist: 周兴哲 / 周興哲 Eric Chou (You Don't Belong To Me)

lines.raw: 周兴哲 Eric Chou
lines.pinyin: Eric Chou

lines.raw: 你不属于我 You Don't Belong To Me
lines.pinyin: You Don't Belong To Me

lines.raw: 比悲伤更悲伤的故事 影集版片尾曲
lines.chinese: 比悲伤更悲伤的故事 影集版片尾曲

lines.raw: 作词：林孝谦
作曲：Eric周兴哲
编曲：于京延
别说永远 Bie shuo yong yuan
lines.pinyin: Bie shuo yong yuan

lines.raw: 永远会让人 yong yuan hui rang ren
lines.pinyin: yong yuan hui rang ren

lines.raw: 更想念 geng xiang nian
lines.pinyin: geng xiang nian

lines.raw: 就像再见 jiu xiang zai jian
lines.pinyin: jiu xiang zai jian

lines.raw: 从不会再见 cong bu hui zai jian
lines.pinyin: cong bu hui zai jian

lines.raw: 越悲伤 就越深刻 yue bei shang jiu yue shen ke
lines.pinyin: yue bei shang jiu yue shen ke

lines.raw: 难道这就是 nan dao zhe jiu shi
lines.pinyin: nan dao zhe jiu shi

lines.raw: 爱情的规则 ai qing de gui ze
lines.pinyin: ai qing de gui ze

lines.raw: 学会成熟 xue hui cheng shou
lines.pinyin: xue hui cheng shou

lines.raw: 不代表学会放手 bu dai biao xue hui fang shou
lines.pinyin: bu dai biao xue hui fang shou

lines.raw: 就像舍得 jiu xiang she de
lines.pinyin: jiu xiang she de

lines.raw: 从来不舍得 cong lai bu she de
lines.pinyin: cong lai bu she de

lines.raw: 爱不用选择 ai bu yong xuan ze
lines.pinyin: ai bu yong xuan ze

lines.raw: 更无需假设 geng wu xu jia she
lines.pinyin: geng wu xu jia she

lines.raw: 我说深深爱过 wo shuo shen shen ai guo
lines.pinyin: wo shuo shen shen ai guo

lines.raw: 才会懂得 cai hui dong de
lines.pinyin: cai hui dong de

lines.raw: 你不属于我 ni bu shu yu wo
lines.pinyin: ni bu shu yu wo

lines.raw: 属于我的脆弱 shu yu wo de cui ruo
lines.pinyin: shu yu wo de cui ruo

lines.raw: 我们只剩今天 wo men zhi sheng jin tian
lines.pinyin: wo men zhi sheng jin tian

lines.raw: 怎么奢求以后 zen me she qiu yi hou
lines.pinyin: zen me she qiu yi hou

lines.raw: 如果你发现我 ru guo ni fa xian wo
lines.pinyin: ru guo ni fa xian wo

lines.raw: 没藏好的那些 mei cang hao di na xie
lines.pinyin: mei cang hao di na xie

lines.raw: 牵强理由 qian qiang li you
lines.pinyin: qian qiang li you

lines.raw: 我会练习有话直说 wo hui lian xi you hua zhi shuo
lines.pinyin: wo hui lian xi you hua zhi shuo

lines.raw: 你不属于我 ni bu shu yu wo
lines.pinyin: ni bu shu yu wo

lines.raw: 属于我的愧疚 shu yu wo de kui jiu
lines.pinyin: shu yu wo de kui jiu

lines.raw: 我是真的愿意 wo shi zhen de yuan yi
lines.pinyin: wo shi zhen de yuan yi

lines.raw: 消失在你身后 xiao shi zai ni shen hou
lines.pinyin: xiao shi zai ni shen hou

lines.raw: 如果你发现我 ru guo ni fa xian wo
lines.pinyin: ru guo ni fa xian wo

lines.raw: 眼泪不停流 yan lei bu ting liu
lines.pinyin: yan lei bu ting liu

lines.raw: 却紧紧守候 que jin jin shouhou
lines.pinyin: que jin jin shouhou

lines.raw: 我想我会坦白 wo xiang wo hui tan bai
